agent.name: Riverside Dental — Appointment Booking
agent.goal: Answer inbound calls, and book a dental appointment for the caller.
agent.prompt: You are the friendly front-desk assistant for Riverside Dental. Greet the caller warmly. Understand why they are calling, then offer to book them an appointment and confirm a specific date and time. Always confirm the appointment details back to the caller before ending the call.

summary.name: Riverside Dental — Appointment Booking
summary.goal: Answer inbound calls, and book a dental appointment for the caller.

recommendations.title: Explicitly Request Confirmation
recommendations.rationale: The agent needs to ensure the customer confirms the booking to meet the goal of booking a dental appointment.
recommendations.suggestedChange: Can you please confirm that you would like to book an appointment for [date] at [time]?

recommendations.title: Clearly Offer Booking Option
recommendations.rationale: To meet the required step of offering to book an appointment, the agent must explicitly state the option to the customer.
recommendations.suggestedChange: Would you like to schedule an appointment with one of our dentists?

recommendations.title: Repeat Back Appointment Details
recommendations.rationale: Repeating back the appointment details ensures clarity and gives the customer a chance to correct any mistakes before confirming.
recommendations.suggestedChange: Just to confirm, I have you booked for [service] on [date] at [time] with [dentist]. Is that correct?

recommendations.title: Emphasize Booking in Greeting
recommendations.rationale: Starting the call with a clear intention to book an appointment can set the tone for the rest of the conversation.
recommendations.suggestedChange: Hello, thank you for calling Riverside Dental. How can I assist you with booking your dental appointment today?

recommendations.title: Handle Common Objections
recommendations.rationale: Preparing the agent to handle common objections can increase the likelihood of confirming a booking.
recommendations.suggestedChange: If the customer expresses uncertainty, respond with 'That's completely understandable. Can I offer you a few alternative dates and times that might work better for you?'

useActions.label: Appointment confirmed by customer
useActions.explanation: Customer never confirmed — goal not reached.

useActions.label: Appointment confirmed by customer
useActions.explanation: Customer never confirmed — goal not reached.

useActions.label: Offers to book an appointment
useActions.explanation: Agent never performed this required step.
